summary: Good‑sounding audience recording that captures the room ambience with a punchy feel.
review: The reviewer finds this audience source superior to other pulls, praising its ability to convey the room’s atmosphere and a noticeably punchy mix. No comments are made about the musical performance itself, so the show quality remains unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review focusing on recording quality; it is positive but provides no insight into the musical performance, limiting confidence in an overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Feels like you can hear the room; punchy sound that makes the audience recording stand out compared to other versions.
